listings.name: APICC Main Parking Lot
listings.address: Aquilino Pimentel Int'l Convention Center grounds
listings.desc: Primary on-site parking for delegates arriving by car or van.

listings.name: Overflow Parking – Capitol Grounds
listings.desc: Secondary parking area with shuttle pickup to the venue.

listings.name: Seda Centrio Hotel
listings.desc: Mid-range hotel roughly 15 minutes from the convention venue.

listings.name: Mallberry Suites Business Hotel
listings.address: Claro M. Recto Ave, Cagayan de Oro
listings.desc: Budget-friendly suites popular with visiting delegates.

listings.name: Dynasty Court Hotel
listings.desc: Centrally located hotel with easy access to jeepney routes.

listings.name: Ate Rica's Lechon
listings.desc: Local favorite for a quick, affordable roast pork lunch.

listings.name: Persimmon Coffee Roasters
listings.desc: Coffee and light meals, a quiet stop between sessions.

listings.name: CDO Public Market
listings.desc: Wet and dry market for fresh produce and inexpensive eats.

listings.name: Robinsons Place CDO
listings.desc: Mall food court and supermarket, good for stocking up.

listings.name: Agora Bus & Jeepney Terminal
listings.desc: Main terminal for jeepneys and buses connecting to the city center.

listings.name: Grab Pickup Point – Venue Gate
listings.desc: Designated ride-hailing pickup and drop-off zone.

listings.name: Cagayan de Oro Airport (Laguindingan)
listings.desc: Nearest airport, about 1 hour from the venue by van or taxi.

listings.name: On-Site First Aid Station
listings.desc: Volunteer-staffed first aid post inside the venue grounds.

listings.name: CDO Pharmacy Plus
listings.desc: Neighborhood pharmacy stocked with common medications.

listings.name: Lost & Found / Info Booth
listings.address: Aquilino Pimentel Int'l Convention Center, near Main Gate
listings.desc: Central point for lost items, program questions, and general help.

listings.name: ATM Cluster – Venue Entrance
listings.desc: Several bank ATMs available near the entrance for cash needs.

listings.name: Water Refilling & Rest Area
listings.address: Aquilino Pimentel Int'l Convention Center grounds
listings.desc: Free drinking water station and shaded seating for breaks.
